name: Penne with Prosciutto & Vodka Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and sauté until fragrant.
2. Stir in the chopped tomatoes, prosciutto, parsley, bay leaves, and red pepper. Simmer for about 10 minutes.
3. Cook the penne pasta according to package instructions, then drain.
4. Stir in the heavy cream into the sauce and cook for 2 minutes over low heat.
5. Mix the cooked penne into the sauce and grate in the Parmesan cheese. Serve with garlic bread.
